summary: Iter 27 — Admin users pagination + A/B Funnel analytics screen. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases pass covering /admin/users pagination/search/role filter/RBAC, /admin/events/funnel variant breakdown + conversion math, /admin/events/recent name filter, anonymous POST /api/events → 204 with persistence verified. Frontend (mobile viewport 375x667): Owner can see A/B Analytics button, screen renders all pickers (experiment/window/conversion event), funnel cards show seeded data (control 3.77%, treatment 9.43%, +159.1% lift chip), empty state appears for unknown experiment id. Support role: A/B Analytics button hidden on /admin home, direct nav to /admin/analytics redirects back to /admin with 'Manager access required' toast.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py /admin/users correctly excludes password_hash and _id; pagination math (has_more) verified against total/skip/limit. Search escapes regex metacharacters — safe from regex-injection.
events.py funnel uses require_roles('manager') which expands to {manager,owner} — matches the documented RBAC ('manager+owner only').

analytics.tsx correctly handles 403 via AdminForbidden -> router.replace('/admin') + toast; gate on /admin home uses canSeePayouts=hasRole(['manager']) which also includes owner — matches requirement.
seed_data_creation: Created+deleted one TEST support sub-admin per RBAC test (auto-teardown in pytest fixture). Created+deleted one test_support_ui@allsale.co.nz for UI testing (manually cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All acceptance criteria for iter27 pass on the public preview URL. Useful seeded analytics fixtures still present: experiment=personalised_rail_v1 with 53/53 exposures + 7 conversions (control 3.77%, treatment 9.43%). Backend test file at backend/tests/test_admin_users_pagination_and_funnel.py is reusable for regression.
